description: Deepen dev-platform (developer-platform), launch-beta, and launch-public packages from skeletons to full implementations with comprehensive tests (15+, 15+, 15+ tests respectively).
steps: DEV-PLATFORM (packages/dev-platform/src/ - package name @quant/developer-platform) - Expand from 3 tests to 15+:
1. Extend types.ts: Add OAuthClient, DeveloperApp, UsageAnalytics, SDKDownload, KeyRotation types.

2. Enhance src/auth/api-key-manager.ts: Add key rotation (create new key, grace period for old, revoke old). Add key scopes (what APIs each key can access). Add usage analytics per key (requests by day/endpoint). Add key expiry (TTL-based auto-revocation).

3. Create src/apps/developer-app-registry.ts: Register developer apps. App metadata (name, description, redirect URIs). App status (active, suspended, under review). App ownership transfer. App usage dashboard data.

4. Create src/oauth/oauth-client-manager.ts: Create/manage OAuth clients. Client ID/secret generation. Redirect URI validation. Scope management. Token generation (access + refresh). Token revocation.

5. Enhance src/webhooks/webhook-manager.ts: Add webhook delivery retry with exponential backoff. Add webhook signature verification. Add delivery log with response codes. Add webhook health scoring. Add dead-letter handling.
6. Create src/analytics/usage-analytics.ts: Track API calls per key/endpoint/day. Rate limit hit tracking. Error rate tracking. Latency percentiles. Usage reports generation.
7. Create src/sdk/sdk-tracker.ts: Track SDK downloads by version/platform. Deprecation warnings for old versions. Changelog notifications. Compatibility matrix.
8. Update src/index.ts to export DeveloperAppRegistry, OAuthClientManager, UsageAnalytics, SDKTracker.

9. Rewrite src/__tests__/dev-platform.test.ts with 15+ tests: key create/rotate/expire/scope, app registration/status/transfer, OAuth client/tokens/revocation, webhook delivery/retry/signature/health, usage analytics tracking/reports, SDK tracking.
LAUNCH-BETA (packages/launch-beta/src/ - already has 9 tests, expand to 15+):
10. Extend types.ts: Add BetaPhase, InviteTemplate, FeedbackCategory, RolloutRule types.

11. Create src/invites/invite-system.ts: Generate invite links with expiry. Invite templates (personalized messaging). Bulk invite sending. Invite tracking (sent/opened/accepted/expired). Waitlist management. Referral tracking.

12. Create src/feedback/feedback-collector.ts: Structured feedback collection (categories: UX, performance, features, bugs). Sentiment analysis (basic keyword-based). Feedback prioritization (by cohort, by frequency). Feature request voting. Feedback response/acknowledgment.

13. Create src/rollout/rollout-controller.ts: Percentage-based rollout with consistent hashing. Staged rollout (1% -> 5% -> 25% -> 50% -> 100%). Rollback mechanism (instant kill to 0%). Canary detection (error rate spike -> auto-rollback). Per-feature rollout schedules.

14. Enhance src/cohort/beta-cohort.ts: Add cohort phases (invite-only, limited, open). Add cohort-level feature flags. Add cohort health metrics (crash rate, error rate). Add cohort comparison reports.
15. Enhance src/metrics/nps-tracker.ts: Add NPS trend over time. Add cohort-level NPS. Add follow-up triggers (low score -> outreach). Add NPS benchmarking.
16. Update src/index.ts to export InviteSystem, FeedbackCollector, RolloutController.

17. Add new tests to src/__tests__/launch-beta.test.ts to reach 15+ total: invite generation/expiry/bulk/referral, feedback collection/sentiment/prioritization, rollout percentage/staged/rollback/canary, cohort phases/health.
LAUNCH-PUBLIC (packages/launch-public/src/ - already has 11 tests, expand to 15+):
18. Extend types.ts: Add StoreSubmission, MarketingSite, PressKit, LaunchMetrics, PostLaunchReport types.

19. Create src/submissions/submission-tracker.ts: Track App Store + Play Store submissions. Status state machine (draft -> submitted -> in_review -> approved/rejected -> live). Rejection reason tracking. Re-submission workflow. Review time estimation.
20. Create src/marketing/marketing-integration.ts: Marketing site content management. Feature highlights. Screenshot/video assets tracking. A/B test landing pages. Conversion tracking.

21. Create src/press/press-kit-manager.ts: Press kit generation (logos, screenshots, description, stats). Embargo management. Press coverage tracking (outlet, sentiment, reach). Media contact list. Press release scheduling.
22. Create src/metrics/launch-metrics.ts: Post-launch metrics dashboard. Download velocity. Retention curves. Revenue tracking. User acquisition cost. Store ranking tracking. Crash-free rate.

23. Enhance src/checklist/launch-checklist.ts: Add checklist templates (ios, android, web). Add gate dependencies (some gates require others first). Add gate auto-check (run verification command). Add deadline tracking.
24. Update src/index.ts to export SubmissionTracker, MarketingIntegration, PressKitManager, LaunchMetrics.

25. Add new tests to src/__tests__/launch-public.test.ts to reach 15+ total: submission state machine/rejection/resubmit, marketing content/A-B tracking, press kit generation/embargo, launch metrics tracking/reports, checklist templates/dependencies/auto-check.
acceptance_criteria: developer-platform has 15+ passing tests covering keys, apps, OAuth, webhooks, analytics, SDK
launch-beta has 15+ passing tests (currently 9, need 6+ more) covering invites, feedback, rollout, enhanced cohorts
launch-public has 15+ passing tests (currently 11, need 4+ more) covering submissions, marketing, press, metrics
pnpm typecheck passes for all three packages with zero errors
All new modules exported from index.ts
